markets.question: Spread: CS Huancayo (-1.5)
markets.description:
In the upcoming Peru Liga 1 game, scheduled for March 22 at 7:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "CS Huancayo" if CS Huancayo win the game by 2 or more goals.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Sport Boys Association".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

This market will resolve according to the official final score published on liga1.pe. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

markets.question: Sport Boys Association vs. CS Huancayo: Both Teams to Score
markets.description:
In the upcoming Peru Liga 1 game between Sport Boys Association and CS Huancayo, scheduled for March 22 at 7:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Yes" if both Sport Boys Association and CS Huancayo each score at least one goal during the game.

This market will resolve to "No" if either team fails to score (i.e., if one or both teams finish with zero goals).
